this is why i have daily profit target. 
i gain only what I need. 
no more. 
i don't want to be billionaire, i don't want to live in luxury (i don't like luxury). 
I like my car that i got from my father, i like small austrian country-side villanges, nice little house, with garden, dog and cat..

comment.body: I see more erratic pa during NFP week (the first week of the month) more specifically the couple of days prior to the NFP print itself.   Some call it seek and destroy.   it's nothing that I can fundamentally qualify, but it seems to be faster action, sometimes harder to trade depending on what your style of trading is.
